note: Bilateral tax-settlement agreements. Each entry defines ONLY the manually negotiated rebate payable to Ireland by the host country — NOT the game's automatic 30% remittance (that is a game mechanic and is never part of the settlement). irishRebate applies to tax generated by Irish-citizen workers; foreignRebate applies to tax generated by non-Irish workers. Keyed by uppercase ISO country code. Countries with no entry fall back to `default` (0 / 0). Add an agreement by adding one entry here — no code changes required. Bump `version` whenever any rate changes so historical settlements can be recalculated.
